steps.title: Connect problem to label
steps.content: The passage describes an uncoordinated railroad system in which trains on one gauge could not travel on another without time-consuming conversions. The final sentence gives the historians' label for that complicated system.

steps.title: Use a result transition
steps.content: Choice A would signal correction. Choice C would make the label an example, and Choice D would signal similarity. The label follows as a result of the confusing mixed-gauge arrangement. The answer is B.
